summary.en: Five brave people who explored the world

sections.zh: 郑和是中国明朝伟大的航海家。
sections.en: Zheng He was a great navigator in China's Ming dynasty.

sections.zh: 他带着庞大的船队七次下西洋，到过很多遥远的国家。
sections.en: He led a huge fleet on seven great voyages to many faraway lands.

sections.zh: 他把中国的友谊和货物带到世界各地，比哥伦布还早。
sections.en: He carried China's friendship and goods around the world, even before Columbus.

sections.zh: 张骞是中国汉朝的探险家和使者。
sections.en: Zhang Qian was an explorer and envoy in China's Han dynasty.

sections.zh: 他骑着骆驼走过沙漠，去往很远很远的西方。
sections.en: He rode camels across the desert to lands far to the west.

sections.zh: 他开辟了丝绸之路，让东方和西方能够交流贸易。
sections.en: He opened the Silk Road, connecting East and West for trade and friendship.

sections.zh: 阿姆斯特朗是美国的宇航员。
sections.en: Neil Armstrong was an American astronaut.

sections.zh: 1969 年，他乘坐飞船飞向月球。
sections.en: In 1969 he flew on a spaceship all the way to the Moon.

sections.zh: 他成为第一个在月球上行走的人，说这是「人类的一大步」。
sections.en: He became the first person to walk on the Moon — one giant leap for humankind.

sections.zh: 埃尔哈特是美国勇敢的女飞行员。
sections.en: Amelia Earhart was a brave American pilot.

sections.zh: 在很少有女性开飞机的年代，她却飞越了大西洋。
sections.en: In a time when few women flew planes, she flew across the Atlantic Ocean.

sections.zh: 她鼓励女孩们勇敢追梦，做自己想做的事。
sections.en: She inspired girls everywhere to be brave and chase their dreams.

sections.zh: 马可·波罗是意大利的旅行家。
sections.en: Marco Polo was a traveler from Italy.

sections.zh: 他年轻时沿着丝绸之路，一路来到遥远的中国。
sections.en: As a young man he traveled the Silk Road all the way to faraway China.

sections.zh: 他把在东方的见闻写成书，让欧洲人认识了中国。
sections.en: He wrote a book about the East that taught Europe about China.
